penalties.description: The loop is secured on the appendage but positioned away from the target mark.

consensus_score.reasoning: Both models agreed on task completion and loop_off_mark penalty. Significant disagreement on completion time (75s vs 130s) was resolved by averaging. Both confirmed the loop was secured but off the target mark, supporting the penalty deduction.

disagreements.rationale: Large timing disagreement with no clear rubric guidance for resolution, so averaged the values to balance both assessments.
Both models agreed on the loop_off_mark penalty, confirming the deduction is warranted.
Averaged the penalty values since both agreed on the violation but disagreed on severity, and rubric does not specify exact deduction amounts.
